query: SELECT b.id, b.userId, b.programId, b.scheduleSlotId, b.status, b.sessionDate, b.sessionStartTime, b.sessionEndTime, p.type FROM bookings b JOIN programs p ON b.programId = p.id WHERE p.type = 'private_lesson' ORDER BY b.id DESC LIMIT 5;
